roleDistribution: Define Center, Team, and Supporting roles
Assign an independent Character Unit ID to every role
Prohibit copying the Center asset as a substitute for role design
characterBalance: Maintain coherent but distinguishable team members
Define team count, formation, and relationship scope
paletteConsistency: Map each role to the approved Palette System
Treat a new color system as a new Gate condition
materialConsistency: Preserve approved material hierarchy and dance function
Map material usage per Character Unit
Treat a new material system as a new Gate condition
cloudCollarConsistency: Treat a new Cloud Collar structure as a new Gate condition
